creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!
This has been explained in other bugs.  xf86-input-libinput is enough to get input devices working in a standard environment.  xf86-input-evdev is sometimes used for special devices, but should not be used in the general case.

In your case, it looks like the devices are detected, but no driver is selected.  Please verify that you have xf86-input-libinput installed.
